unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Computer
title: Online Shopping and Banking
drDigitalIntro: Online banking lets you check your balance, pay bills, and transfer money from your computer. Online shopping lets you buy almost anything and have it delivered. Both are safe when used on trusted websites. Key rules: only use official bank websites (type the address yourself — never follow emailed links), look for the padlock/https, and never do banking on public WiFi without a VPN. Let's practice checking links before shopping.

playgroundTask.goal: You verified safe banking and shopping links

steps.say: Go to the Phishing tab to check some banking links.
Inspect 'Bank of America Login' to check the URL.
bankofamerica.com with https — that's safe. Mark it Safe.
That URL is suspicious — mark it Dangerous.

drDigitalSuccess: You checked banking links for safety! Always verify the URL before entering card details.
drDigitalHint: Click Inspect on each link to see the real URL, then judge whether it's safe.
